Device_Variant_1.intendedUseSummary: Replace with intended use summary for variant 1. Example: [Device] attaches to [equipment] and enables [user] to [function] during [procedure type].

Device_Variant_2.intendedUseSummary: Replace with intended use summary for variant 2, or remove this block if only one variant.

postMarketSurveillance.updateFrequency: Replace with update frequency (e.g., 'Annually', 'Every Two Years', 'When Necessary')
postMarketSurveillance.submissionConditionNote: Only required if implantable or EU Class III

B_customer_feedback.ownerRole: Replace with responsible role (e.g., 'Marketing Product Manager')
B_customer_feedback.processSummary: Replace with your customer feedback collection process summary. Describe how feedback is collected, categorized, and routed to the appropriate quality process.

routingRules.nonComplaintFeedbackHandling: Replace with how non-complaint feedback is handled

outputsForPMSR: Summary of non-complaint feedback received during the PMSR surveillance period

C_product_complaint_handling.ownerGroup: Replace with responsible group (e.g., 'Product Surveillance group')

complaintSummary: complaint rates (complaint counts per unit sales) during the PMSR surveillance period
pmsrContentProvided.source: Provided by Product Surveillance group for inclusion in the PMSR

D_product_complaint_rate_trending_and_tr.complaintRateDefinition: Total number of complaints for a particular period divided by the estimated number of uses during that period.

trendReporting.submissionChannel: Notified body (via the EUDAMED system once operational)
trendReporting.trigger: When associated trend reporting criteria are met
pmsrInclusions: Overall complaint rate trending throughout the PMSR surveillance period
Listing of trend reports submitted to the EU during the surveillance period

riskManagementComparison.comparisonStatement: Actual rate of occurrence for harms reported over the PMSR surveillance period will be compared to the maximum rates predicted within the risk management file (RMF).
riskManagementComparison.actionsIfOutOfBounds: If harms occurred that are not captured in the RMF or occur more frequently than predicted, additional investigation will be undertaken to determine what actions are potentially needed to address this.

E_adverse_event_reporting.assessmentRule: Each complaint will be assessed against the criteria for adverse event reporting; as needed, reports will be submitted in the manner described in the procedure.

seriousIncidentHandling.reportToCompetentAuthorities: During the surveillance period, serious incidents shall be reported to the competent authorities of the countries in which the incident occurred.

ifuNotice.noticeSummary: Any serious incident that has occurred in relation to the device should be reported to the manufacturer and the competent authority of the Member State in which the user and/or patient is established.

pmsrInclusions: Listing of adverse events occurring during the surveillance period which required submission of an adverse event report

F_field_safety_corrective_actions.continuousEvaluation: Incidents will be continuously evaluated for user safety and product performance via PMS activities outlined in this PMSP.
F_field_safety_corrective_actions.traceabilityNote: Includes methods to trace and identify devices for which corrective actions might be necessary.
F_field_safety_corrective_actions.notifiedBodyCommunication: Notices, notifications, and reports will be sent to notified bodies through the EUDAMED system or the electronic system utilized by the respective competent authority.
pmsrInclusions: Summary of FSCAs initiated for the device product during the PMSR surveillance period

referencePlan.name: Clinical Evaluation Plan (CEP) for [Your Device Name]

deliverables.cer: Detailed review included in the clinical evaluation report (CER).
deliverables.pmsr: Summary of the review for the PMSR surveillance period included in the PMSR.

escalationRule.action: Submit to Product Surveillance group for processing per Product Complaint Handling procedure

minimumScope.database: US FDA Manufacturer and User Facility Device Experience (MAUDE) database
minimumScope.productCode: Replace with your FDA product code

pmsrInclusions: Summary of any issues found dated during the surveillance period (e.g., AERs, FSCAs)
H_review_of_external_databases_and_regis.issueEscalation: Any issues identified that are specifically associated with the device are to be submitted to the Product Surveillance group for assessment as complaints.

pmsrInclusions: Summary of product-specific production information during the PMSR surveillance period
Listing and description of product-specific CAPAs initiated during the PMSR surveillance period

K_post_market_clinical_follow_up.statement: Replace with your PMCF rationale statement. Example: Proactive collection of additional data through PMCF is [planned/not expected to provide meaningful additional evidence] to support the safety and clinical performance of the product.
rationale: Add additional rationale points as needed

L_benefit_risk_assessment.cadenceRule: No less frequently than the update cadence for the CER (as specified in the CEP).
pmsrInclusions: Summary of the Benefit-Risk Assessment included in the PMSR

referencedDocuments.name: Clinical Evaluation Plan (CEP) for [Your Device Name]
